      <div data-custom-class="title" style="line-height: 1.5;"><strong><span style="font-size: 15px;"><h1>ACCESSIBILITY STATEMENT</h1></span></strong></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">This statement applies to the <bdt class="block-component"></bdt><span style="color: rgb(0, 58, 250);"><bdt class="question">kermitwebcraft.com</bdt></span> website<bdt class="statement-end-if-in-editor"></bdt><bdt class="block-component"></bdt><bdt class="block-component"></bdt>.</span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="heading_1" style="line-height: 1.5;"><strong><h2>OUR COMMITMENT</h2></strong></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><bdt class="question">Kermit Webcraft</bdt> is committed to ensuring our services are accessible to people with disabilities. We aim to conform with <bdt class="block-component"></bdt>the <bdt class="question">WCAG 2.2 Level AA</bdt><bdt class="else-block"></bdt>.<bdt class="block-component"></bdt> This accessibility style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><bdt class="block-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="heading_1" style="line-height: 1.5;"><strong><h2>ACCESSIBILITY FEATURES</h2></strong></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">You should be able to:<bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span><bdt class="block-component"><span style="font-size: 15px;"></bdt></span></div><div><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="heading_1" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><strong><h2>CONFORMANCE STATUS</h2></strong></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><strong>Status:</strong> <bdt class="question">Partially compliant</bdt> with <bdt class="question">WCAG 2.2 Level AA</bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">We CONTENT</h2></strong></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">Below is a description of known limitations we're working to address.<bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5; margin-left: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">1. <bdt class="question"><strong>Color contrast in some design elements</strong></bdt><strong>:</strong> <bdt class="question">Some decorative elements and accent colors may not yet meet the recommended WCAG 2.2 Level AA contrast ratios on all devices and screen settings.</bdt><bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5; margin-left: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">2. <bdt class="question"><strong>Keyboard navigation review in progress</strong></bdt><strong>:</strong> <bdt class="question">Not all interactive elements have been fully tested for keyboard-only navigation and focus visibility.</bdt><bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5; margin-left: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">3. <bdt class="question"><strong>Alternative text for future portfolio images</strong></bdt><strong>:</strong> <bdt class="question">Some portfolio or project images added in the future may require additional descriptive alternative text to ensure accessibility for screen reader users.</bdt><bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5; margin-left: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">4. <bdt class="question"><strong>Third-party integrations</strong></bdt><strong>:</strong> <bdt class="question">Accessibility of embedded third-party tools, forms, or widgets may vary and is dependent on the accessibility practices of those providers.</bdt><bdt class="forloop-component"></bdt></span></div><div style="line-height: 1.5;"><br></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><bdt class="block-component"></bdt>We're prioritizing these fixes with completion expected by <bdt class="question">Kermit Webcraft is committed to continuously improving accessibility and usability. We regularly review our website and services to identify and address accessibility barriers..</bdt><bdt class="else-block"></bdt><bdt class="statement-end-if-in-editor"></bdt><br></span></div><div 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><strong><h2>PREPARATION OF THIS STATEMENT</h2></strong></span></div><div data-custom-class="body_text" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-size: 15px;">This statement was prepared on <bdt class="question">14 June 2026</bdt> and is reviewed <bdt class="question">annually</bdt> or when we make significant service changes.</span></div><div
